name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Lilbot
title: "[feature] "

---

## Problem

What workflow is not working well today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the improvement you want.

## Why It Fits Lilbot

Explain why this belongs in a local-first, transparent CLI assistant.

## Extra Context

Examples, screenshots, prior art, or rough implementation notes.
